title: Glycerol Trinitrate
description: A fake Minecraft optimization mod for less memory usage.
body:
# Glycerol Trinitrate

An extremely simple optimization mod for less memory usage.

When you enter command /opti, it will reduce the memory occupation of the game.

This mod is a little unstable. Because it may cause damage to the game map.

So please be responsible for any consequences.

If you want to know how it works, please see the wiki page on the left side of this page.

The mod is not suitable for the server.

![Comparison Chart](https://i.postimg.cc/RFvMLJ2H/Comparison-Chart.png)

# The Truth

This is a fake Minecraft optimization mod.

In fact, the "less memory usage" is zero memory usage.

This does not change actual memory usage, only stop the game to reduce memory usage as a joke.

This mod is for entertainment only, do not use it on the server or use it for improper operations.

It may lead to the destruction of the map or even the burning of the CPU.
